'''Quint''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located in the [[Inner Rim/Legends|Inner Rim]] that was the [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of the [[Quint (species)|Quint]] [[Species/Legends|species]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Jedi Apprentice: The Evil Experiment]]'' {{1stm}}
